changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires missiles at Israeli troops on Lebanon border — first direct strike in Lebanon theater
latest_news.text: Iran launches wave of missiles at Israeli forces in and around Lebanon border. Second wave fired less than hour later. First direct Iranian strike in Lebanon theater.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Tehran again overnight — new wave of strikes on Iran capital
latest_news.text: Israel launches fresh strikes on Tehran overnight as Sarr announces Larijani and Soleimani killings. Continued escalation of Israeli strikes deep into Iran.

latest_news.headline: Katz: displaced Lebanese wont return south of Litani — prolonged occupation feared
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz: hundreds of thousands displaced wont return south of Litani until safety guaranteed. Drawing Gaza comparison. HRW warns of war crime risk (forced displacement).

latest_news.headline: HMS Dragon arrives in Mediterranean heading to eastern Med
latest_news.text: UK warship HMS Dragon arrives in Mediterranean after leaving UK March 10. Heading to eastern Mediterranean to boost UK military presence. RAF Cyprus base faced drone attacks.

latest_news.headline: Trump warns NATO faces very bad future if allies refuse Hormuz help
latest_news.text: Trump warns NATO faces very bad future if allies refuse to help secure Strait of Hormuz. Reiterated he was not happy with UK. Starmer refuses to send warships.

latest_news.headline: India-Iran Hormuz deal: 2 ships pass in tanker exchange
latest_news.text: India and Iran negotiate: 2 Indian vessels with 92,712 tonnes LPG allowed through Hormuz in exchange for 3 Iranian tankers seized by India. Jaishankar: every ship movement is individual.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21 10:00) — Day 17 of Iran war. Leadership decapitation intensifying: Israel confirms killing Ali Larijani (security chief) + Basij cmdr Soleimani. Kataib Hezbollah cmdr al-Askari killed in Baghdad. IRGC warns US-linked industrial facilities face imminent attack. Beirut strikes hit 3 neighborhoods, simultaneous new Tehran attacks. Lebanon displaced exceeds 1M (886+ killed). 10 foreigners arrested in Iran for spying. Trump scolds allies over Hormuz. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire collapsed. No de-escalation in any theater.
